id.description: SKU ID of the item that will replace the previous one. If you only wish to replace the product weight, you will repeat the SKU ID used in `from`.

quantity.description: Updated quantity of the item been changed.

measurementUnit.description: Measurement unit of the new item. The values accepted are the measurement units registered in the store's catalog. For example, `kg` for kilograms or `un` for unitary items. When you don't specify a value, the request gets the information from the Catalog.

unitMultiplier.description: Unit multiplier for item update. For example, if you wish to increase an order with three times more items than a single one, you would fill in with `3.0`.
